def positive_optional_library_import_checked_on_hot_code_path():
    rule_id = "optional_library_import_checked_on_hot_code_path"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Optional-dependency import guarded by try/except ImportError checked on every request."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
